steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks how the passage is structured. The word 'However' is the key signal — it marks a shift from a result to a concern that qualifies or complicates it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'centers on fish species': The fish species are context, not the passage's main focus. ✗
  • Choice B — 'presents a problem then a solution': No solution is offered — 'However' introduces a concern, not a fix. ✗
  • Choice C — 'draws a similarity': 'However' signals contrast, not similarity. ✗
  • Choice D — 'presents a result, then raises a concern': The first part reports a finding; 'However' introduces doubt about it — exactly the structure here. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
